en.text: from a compound of G0001 (as a negative particle) and G2540 (meaning unseasonable); to be inopportune (for oneself), i.e. to fail of a proper occasion

senses.gloss_en: from a compound of G0001 (as a negative particle) and G2540 (meaning unseasonable); to be inopportune (for oneself), i.e. to fail of a proper occasion
